rows.label: tlk43200142_06_msg0002
rows.name:
Some of the Hræsvelgr ankle
biters said they saw a giant
fish down at Farlaine Wells!

rows.label: tlk43200142_06_msg0003
rows.name:
I bet every merc group
this side of Alst'll be
angling for that whopper!

rows.label: tlk43200142_06_msg0004
rows.name:
We're the ones who found it,
so another Merc Group capturing
it would be irritating!

rows.label: tlk43200142_06_msg0005
rows.name:
Please! Catch the giant fish
before them!

rows.label: tlk43200142_06_msg0006
rows.name:
...That's what my dad was
saying the other day.
